mapper.insert:
WITH input AS (SELECT #{geoJson}::jsonb AS data)
INSERT INTO geo_feature (id, name, geom, properties, created_at)
-- FeatureCollection SELECT generate_snowflake_id(), #{featureEntity.name}, ST_Transform( ST_SetSRID( ST_GeomFromGeoJSON( f.value ->> 'geometry' ), 4326 ), 4326 ), f.value -> 'properties', now()
FROM input, LATERAL jsonb_array_elements(data -> 'features') AS f(value)
WHERE data ->> 'type' = 'FeatureCollection'
UNION ALL
-- 单 Feature SELECT #{featureEntity.id}, #{featureEntity.name}, ST_Transform( ST_SetSRID( ST_GeomFromGeoJSON(data ->> 'geometry'), 4326 ), 4326 ), data -> 'properties', now()
FROM input
WHERE data ->> 'type' = 'Feature'

INSERT INTO geo_feature (id, name, geom, properties, created_at) VALUES (#{featureEntity.id}, #{featureEntity.name}, CASE WHEN #{srid} = 4326 THEN ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromText(#{wkt}), 4326) ELSE ST_Transform( ST_SetSRID(ST_GeomFromText(#{wkt}), #{srid}), 4326 ) END, #{featureEntity.properties}::jsonb, now())
mapper.select:
SELECT jsonb_build_object( 'type', 'FeatureCollection', 'features', COALESCE( jsonb_agg( jsonb_build_object( 'type', 'Feature', 'id', id::text, 'geometry', ST_AsGeoJSON(geom)::jsonb, 'properties', properties ) ), '[]'::jsonb ) ) FROM geo_feature
WHERE geom && ST_MakeEnvelope(#{dto.minX}, #{dto.minY}, #{dto.maxX}, #{dto.maxY}, 4326) AND ST_Intersects( geom, ST_MakeEnvelope(#{dto.minX}, #{dto.minY}, #{dto.maxX}, #{dto.maxY}, 4326) )

SELECT jsonb_build_object( 'type', 'FeatureCollection', 'features', COALESCE( jsonb_agg( jsonb_build_object( 'type', 'Feature', 'id', id::text, 'geometry', ST_AsGeoJSON(geom)::jsonb, 'properties', properties ) ), '[]'::jsonb ) ) FROM geo_feature WHERE ( geom && ST_MakeEnvelope(170, #{dto.minY}, 180, #{dto.maxY}, 4326) AND ST_Intersects(geom, ST_MakeEnvelope(170, #{dto.minY}, 180, #{dto.maxY}, 4326)) ) OR ( geom && ST_MakeEnvelope(-180, #{dto.minY}, -170, #{dto.maxY}, 4326) AND ST_Intersects(geom, ST_MakeEnvelope(-180, #{dto.minY}, -170, #{dto.maxY}, 4326)) )
SELECT id, name, jsonb_build_object( 'type', 'Feature', 'geometry', ST_AsGeoJSON(geom)::jsonb, 'properties', properties ) AS geo_json, properties, created_at FROM geo_feature WHERE id = #{id}
